subject: Patch scripts/set_source_trust.py to sqlite3-only and fix --trusted flag behavior
description: Remove any SQLAlchemy ORM usage; ensure SELECT/UPDATE are simple sqlite3; accept --trusted with optional value (supports both '--trusted' and '--trusted true/false').
activeForm: Replaced SQLAlchemy with sqlite3; removed ORDER BY version; --trusted now supports '--trusted', '--trusted true', '--trusted false'
